title: System Design for Beginners (Full Guide)
summary: A system design interview framework that prioritizes problem understanding over technology selection. The approach covers seven sequential steps from requirements gathering through implementation constraints, using a URL shortener as a practical example.
writeup: This guide presents a system design interview framework that emphasizes understanding the problem before selecting technology. It walks through seven sequential steps, from requirements gathering to implementation constraints, and applies them to a URL shortener as a worked example. The takeaway is a repeatable structure for approaching design questions that treats clarifying scope and constraints as the foundation rather than jumping to specific tools.
